title: Postgraduate Certificate in Clinical Trichology and Hair Restoration Medicine
description: Structured postgraduate doctor education in clinical trichology, hair loss medicine, regenerative medicine, and hair restoration surgery.
prerequisites: Primary medical qualification or equivalent physician-level training
Current or intended clinical involvement in hair loss medicine, trichology, dermatology, aesthetic medicine, or hair restoration surgery
Commitment to evidence-led postgraduate study and faculty-reviewed assessment
outcomes: Develop physician-level competence in structured trichology and hair loss assessment
Interpret follicular biology, endocrine drivers, and scalp disease within a clinical reasoning framework
Construct evidence-aware therapeutic and regenerative management plans
Understand candidacy, planning, and foundational science relevant to hair restoration surgery
Complete capstone case review and final certification assessment under academic governance

certificationRules.certificateEligibilityRule: All required modules, assessments, capstone review, and final faculty checks must be completed in good academic standing.
certificationRules.distinctionEligibilityRule: Distinction requires certificate eligibility plus performance at or above the distinction threshold across assessed work without unresolved faculty concerns.
